title: agriophyllum lateriflorum
intro: Agriophyllum lateriflorum is a plant species commonly known as side-flowering agriophyllum, a type of shrubby perennial plant that belongs to the family Chenopodiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Agriophyllum lateriflorum include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
